## Implementation Stages

### Stage 1: Foundation & Setup
**Duration:** [Estimated time]
**Dependencies:** None

#### Phase 1a: Development
**Goal:** Establish core infrastructure and architecture

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Set up development environment
- [ ] Initialize project structure
- [ ] Configure build tools and CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Set up database and basic schema
- [ ] Create basic authentication system
- [ ] **Create mock services for testing** (if applicable)

**Deliverables:**
- Running application with basic structure
- Configuration system working
- Development environment documented

#### Phase 1b: Testing
**Goal:** Validate infrastructure and basic functionality

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Test application startup and shutdown
- [ ] Validate configuration loading
- [ ] Test database connectivity
- [ ] Test health check endpoints
- [ ] Create basic smoke tests
- [ ] Document testing approach

**Exit Criteria:**
- Application starts without errors
- All health checks pass
- Basic infrastructure validated
- Testing documentation created

---

### Stage 2: Core Features
**Duration:** [Estimated time]
**Dependencies:** Stage 1 complete (both phases)

#### Phase 2a: Development
**Goal:** Implement essential functionality

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Implement [core feature 1] - **FRD:** [Link]
- [ ] Implement [core feature 2] - **FRD:** [Link]
- [ ] Create main user interface
- [ ] Set up routing and navigation
- [ ] Implement basic CRUD operations
- [ ] **Create/update mock services for new features**

**Deliverables:**
- Core features implemented
- Basic user flows working
- API endpoints functional

#### Phase 2b: Testing
**Goal:** Validate core features with mocks and integration tests

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Create unit tests for core features
- [ ] Test with mock services
- [ ] Validate main user flows (manual)
- [ ] Test API endpoints with mock data
- [ ] Integration testing between components
- [ ] Document test scenarios and results
- [ ] Create testing guide for developers

**Test Coverage Requirements:**
- Core feature logic: >80% coverage
- API endpoints: All tested
- Critical user flows: Manual validation

**Exit Criteria:**
- All core features tested and validated
- Integration tests passing
- Mock services enabling complete testing
- No critical bugs

---

### Stage 3: Advanced Features
**Duration:** [Estimated time]
**Dependencies:** Stage 2 complete (both phases)

#### Phase 3a: Development
**Goal:** Implement complex functionality

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Implement [advanced feature 1] - **FRD:** [Link]
- [ ] Implement [advanced feature 2] - **FRD:** [Link]
- [ ] Add third-party integrations
- [ ] Implement complex business logic
- [ ] Add advanced UI components
- [ ] **Extend mock services for advanced features**

**Deliverables:**
- Advanced features implemented
- Third-party integrations working
- Complex workflows functional

#### Phase 3b: Testing
**Goal:** End-to-end testing and performance validation

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Create comprehensive integration tests
- [ ] Test end-to-end user scenarios
- [ ] Performance testing (response times, throughput)
- [ ] Load testing with realistic data volumes
- [ ] Test third-party integrations (with mocks if needed)
- [ ] Security testing (authentication, authorization)
- [ ] Cross-browser/platform testing (if applicable)
- [ ] Document performance benchmarks

**Test Coverage Requirements:**
- Overall code coverage: >75%
- Critical paths: 100% coverage
- Performance benchmarks documented

**Exit Criteria:**
- All features tested end-to-end
- Performance meets requirements
- Security vulnerabilities addressed
- Integration tests passing

---

### Stage 4: Polish & Production Readiness
**Duration:** [Estimated time]
**Dependencies:** Stage 3 complete (both phases)

#### Phase 4a: Development
**Goal:** Optimize and polish for production

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Optimize performance bottlenecks
- [ ] Enhance UI/UX based on testing feedback
- [ ] Implement comprehensive error handling
- [ ] Add monitoring and observability
- [ ] Prepare deployment scripts
- [ ] Final bug fixes

**Deliverables:**
- Production-ready application
- Deployment automation
- Monitoring configured

#### Phase 4b: Testing
**Goal:** Production readiness validation

**Sub-steps:**
- [ ] Comprehensive automated test suite
- [ ] Load testing with production-like scenarios
- [ ] Security audit and penetration testing
- [ ] Disaster recovery testing
- [ ] User acceptance testing (UAT)
- [ ] Documentation review and updates
- [ ] Pre-production deployment test
- [ ] Performance regression testing

**Test Coverage Requirements:**
- Overall code coverage: >80%
- All critical flows: 100% coverage
- Load testing: Production scale validated
- Security: No critical vulnerabilities

**Exit Criteria:**
- All automated tests passing
- Performance validated at scale
- Security audit passed
- Documentation complete
- Ready for production deployment

---
